description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty dump truck with a robust, angular cab and a prominent dump bed designed for transporting and unloading bulk materials. The cab features a wide windshield, side mirrors, and a visible front grille, with a license plate mounted below. The dump bed is high-walled and tapers toward the rear, with a rear gate that can be opened for unloading. The truck has three axles, with six wheels visible, and side-mounted fuel tanks and exhaust pipes. The exterior is primarily a matte gray color, giving it an industrial appearance suitable for construction or urban maintenance work. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, with hard surfaces and minimal decorative elements.
description: A large, gray dump truck with a high-walled dump bed and a robust, angular cab, designed for heavy-duty urban or construction use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, grille, headlights, and license plate, with the dump bed rising behind the cab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the dump bed, three axles, six wheels, and side-mounted fuel tank and exhaust.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the high-walled dump bed and rear gate, emphasizing the truck's cargo capacity.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the dump bed, wheels, and cab details from the opposite side.
